name: Coffee Nips Coffee Cake
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Unsalted butter or canola oil
recipeInstructions:
1. If the bread machine instructions call for yeast to be placed in the baking pan first, add the dry ingredients separately before adding liquids.
2. Pour milk into the pan, then add butter or canola oil, egg, and coffee extract.
3. Add all-purpose flour, semolina flour, graham cracker crumbs, sugar, instant Viennese chocolate-coffee mixture, and instant coffee to the pan.
4. If your machine has a yeast dispenser, add it last; otherwise, mix it with the other ingredients.
5. Set the machine to its rapid-bake cycle for this loaf.
6. Slice the bread into fairly thick pieces, then cut each piece into four triangles, canape style.
7. Spread the triangles with Mocha Buttercream Icing and garnish each with chocolate coffee beans.
Makes one large loaf.
